about: Report something that isn't working as expected

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Choose '...' (Files / Folder / URL / Text)
3. Convert '...'
4. See the error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Sample input

If possible, attach a small sample file or paste the URL/text that triggers the problem.
(Don't attach anything confidential.)

## Error / warning text

Paste any error message, warning callout, or relevant log output here.

## Environment

- Omnivert version: <!-- Help/About, or the installer filename, e.g. Omnivert-Setup-0.1.0.exe -->
- Windows version: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 23H2 -->
- Install type: <!-- installed Setup.exe / running from source -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, frequency, recent changes, etc.
